intro: Leucadendron levisanus, also known as the Snowy River Conebush, is a species of shrub in the family Proteaceae native to South Africa. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, offering health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities, which may help to alleviate symptoms of arthritis and other inflammatory conditions.
